_meta.purpose: AISC steel section catalog for FCL.
_meta.usage: Call sections using aisc.key and pass only span.
rules: Section names retain AISC imperial designation.
Do not pass section dimensions directly.

WT.name: AISC WT Shapes
WT.description: AISC structural tees cut from W shapes.

ST.name: AISC ST Shapes
ST.description: AISC structural tees cut from S shapes.

MT.name: AISC MT Shapes
MT.description: AISC structural tees cut from M shapes.

L.name: AISC Single Angles
L.description: AISC equal and unequal leg angle shapes.
